productName: .5g Isolated Pre-Rolled Cones, 2ct - Isolated Juicee J Pre-Rolled Cones - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Juicee J supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of apricot, blueberry, and berry, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
